title: <div>Select a DOMAIN anchored to one of the organs (META, MYTH, WAVE, RECURSION,
content:
Select a DOMAIN anchored to one of the organs (META, MYTH, WAVE, RECURSION, PROCGEN, ARCHIVE, OS, AGENT).
Choose the TYPE from the allowed categories or, if necessary, propose a new TYPE in a SYSTEM-layer spec before using it broadly.
Assign an ID that encodes either numeric indexing (0001) or a stable symbolic identifier (WORLD-0100, CHAR-0044).
Start VERSION at v0_1 for drafts, increment major versions for breaking changes, and minor for refinements.

If unsure, the AI should create a SYSTEM-META-LOG-NAMING-XXXX-v0_1 artifact in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/specs explaining its reasoning and inviting future refinement.

────────────────────────
7. Prompt Suite and Handoff Practices

7.1 System-Level Prompts

$PROMPT_ROOT/system contains templates that set up an AI run with the OS context. A core template might be named:

SYSTEM-META-PROMPT-INIT-0001-v1_0

Its content includes:

A compressed summary of this specification.
Instructions on looking up relevant manifest entries in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta.
